blocks.content: It started as a note in English class.

A girl named Tanya who sat two rows over had been running a parallel communication network while appearing to take notes. The note read: Lauren says Kit Jenkins and Daisy Jones have been dating since 5th grade is that true??
Daisy found out at lunch from a girl named Chloe who came up standing close, voice low.

blocks.speaker: Chloe
blocks.content: Okay don't be weird about this, but someone's been asking if you and Kit are together.
Daisy kept her face very still.

blocks.speaker: Chloe
blocks.content: I didn't say you were. I'm just saying people are asking.

blocks.speaker: Chloe
blocks.content: I mean, you two are always together.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: We've been friends since we were eight.
Daisy stood at her locker and stared at nothing for three seconds and then closed the door.
